description: Add game_id field to all entity interfaces (Star, Planet, StarLane, Empire, Fleet, BuildQueue, TurnHistory) in game-entities.ts to match the future games table schema from FN-010
summary: Added game_id field to all 7 core entity interfaces (Star, Planet, StarLane, Empire, Fleet, BuildQueue, TurnHistory) in game-entities.ts. Updated Galaxy types and conversion functions to support the new field. Fixed pre-existing lint errors. Typecheck, lint, and all 90 tests pass. Created follow-up task FN-018 for updating interface consumers.
